  • Location Jordan
  • Fixed price
  • Intermediate
  • Est. budget: $60.00

I have a web app built using .NET and Angular. It’s supposed to show live updates (like notifications or data updating automatically), but right now it’s not working properly. 1. Troubleshoot Real-Time Events - Identify why real-time updates are not working (e.g., SignalR/WebSockets issue) - Fix the connection between backend and frontend - Ensure events are triggered and received correctly in Angular - Verify functionality in local environment 2. Azure Deployment - Deploy the .NET API to Azure Web App - Deploy Angular app (or integrate with backend hosting) - Ensure real-time functionality works after deployment - Basic configuration only This should be a small task for someone experienced. Looking for a quick and reliable fix.

We are looking for a Full Stack Developer to scale a mission-critical ecosystem that integrates monitoring with rehabilitation resources to transform lives and increase public safety. This individual will have a strong foundation in C# .NET, ASP.NET, Windows Services, and expertise in cloud-based architectures. The ideal candidate will have advanced skills in ElasticSearch query development, be proficient in modern JavaScript frameworks, and possess a deep understanding of microservices, secure development, and cloud environments like AWS GovCloud. If you're passionate about building secure, scalable, and efficient applications, this is a great opportunity to join a forward-thinking team working on mission-critical systems. Key Responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain full-stack applications using C# .NET, including ASP.NET and Windows Services. Develop and maintain TRACKtech Core API’s for consumption by internal usage and clients. Proficient with API design and development Create complex ElasticSearch queries for data retrieval and reporting purposes. Develop dynamic front-end features using Angular, TypeScript, and NodeJS. Perform advanced data querying and report development using DocumentDb or similar NoSQL databases. Implement and manage CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps, automating builds, tests, and deployments. Ensure responsive web design implementation with Bootstrap, CSS, and HTML. Architect and implement microservices-based solutions, leveraging AWS cloud technologies, including Lambda, API Gateway, and S3. Ensure secure development practices throughout the SDLC, adhering to industry standards like CJIS, FedRAMP, and SOC II. Optimize applications to run efficiently in AWS GovCloud environments. Collaborate closely with security, DevOps, and infrastructure teams to ensure compliance with secure computing standards. Participate in code reviews. Implement various API integrations with 3rd party tools and services Required Skills & Qualifications: C# .NET (5+ years): Extensive experience with C# .NET, including ASP.NET and Windows Services development. ElasticSearch Query Development: Advanced skills in creating and optimizing ElasticSearch queries for efficient data retrieval. JavaScript (Angular, NodeJS, TypeScript): Proficient in developing web applications with modern JavaScript frameworks, particularly Angular. DocumentDb (5+ years): Strong expertise in DocumentDb (or similar NoSQL databases) with advanced querying and complex reporting skills. Azure DevOps: Experience in configuring and managing DevOps pipelines using Azure DevOps. Bootstrap & Responsive Design: Ability to implement responsive web designs using Bootstrap, HTML, and CSS. Secure SDLC Practices: Expertise in implementing secure development practices throughout the software lifecycle. Microservices Architecture: Strong understanding and experience in building and deploying microservices architectures. AWS GovCloud Services: Proficiency in leveraging AWS GovCloud services for secure, scalable application hosting and management. AWS Cloud Stack: In-depth experience with AWS services such as Lambda, API Gateway, S3, and other essential AWS tools.

Job Description: We are looking for an experienced .NET developer to join our team on an enterprise-grade tax engagement management platform. The application serves a global professional services firm and integrates with major tax compliance platforms. Tech Stack: Frontend: Blazor Server with Syncfusion Blazor UI component library Backend: ASP.NET Core Web API (.NET 8+) Database: SQL Server with Entity Framework Core (multiple DbContexts, triggered entities) Auth: Cookie-based + JWT Bearer authentication, Azure Key Vault for secret management Background Jobs: Hangfire Mapping: AutoMapper Session: Blazored.SessionStorage Hosting: IIS (Windows Server) Third-Party API Integrations: Thomson Reuters ONESOURCE Tax (Income Tax, DataFlow, DataHub, Administration, Calendar) Wolters Kluwer CCH Axcess SurePrep ImagineTime / ImagineShare Internal Client Access Portal (CAP) What You'll Be Doing: Building and enhancing Blazor Server UI components (data grids, dialogs, wizard-style workflows) Developing and maintaining ASP.NET Core API endpoints and services Writing and optimizing Entity Framework Core queries across multiple database contexts Integrating with external tax platform REST APIs (OAuth token management, data synchronization) Implementing Hangfire background jobs for automated workflows Writing SQL Server stored procedures and managing database migrations Bug fixes, performance optimization, and code reviews Required Skills: 4+ years with C# / .NET Core / ASP.NET Core Strong experience with Blazor Server (not just Blazor WASM) Proficiency with Entity Framework Core (multi-context, migrations, triggers) Solid SQL Server skills (queries, stored procedures, indexing) Experience consuming and integrating REST APIs with HttpClient Familiarity with JWT and Cookie-based authentication Understanding of CORS, IIS deployment, and enterprise hosting Nice to Have: Experience with Syncfusion Blazor components Familiarity with Hangfire for background job processing Knowledge of tax compliance software (ONESOURCE, CCH Axcess, SurePrep) Azure Key Vault or similar secrets management AutoMapper experience Engagement Details: Long-term / ongoing engagement Part-time to start (20 hrs/week) with potential to increase Must be available during US business hours NDA required To Apply, Please Include: Relevant Blazor Server project examples (not Blazor WASM) Experience with enterprise-scale .NET applications Brief description of your experience with external API integrations

Overview As a US-based software agency, we’re looking for a Senior Full-Stack Developer to build and maintain modern web applications, with a focus on backend services, cloud infrastructure, and AI-powered features. This is a hands-on role spanning frontend, backend, and system integrations Responsibilities - Develop and maintain web applications using JavaScript/TypeScript (React, Next.js, or similar) - Build backend services and APIs using Python and/or .NET - Design and integrate RESTful APIs and third-party services - Work with AWS (e.g., Lambda, S3, RDS) to deploy and scale applications - Implement AI-powered features (e.g., API integrations, data processing, automation workflows) - Debug issues, optimize performance, and improve system reliability Required Skills - Strong experience with JavaScript / TypeScript - Backend development experience with Python and/or .NET - Experience building and consuming REST APIs - Hands-on experience with AWS or similar cloud platforms - Experience integrating external APIs (AI/ML experience is a plus) - Strong problem-solving and debugging skills Nice to Have - Experience with AI/LLM integrations (OpenAI, LangChain, etc.) - Experience with scalable system design - Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices

  • $0 spent
  • Location Saudi Arabia
  • Hourly: $20.00 - $40.00
  • Expert
  • Est. time: 3 to 6 months, Less than 30 hrs/week

Job Description We are looking for an experienced Integration Engineer to build the card benefits and offers aggregation layer. This is a critical module that connects to Visa Developer Platform APIs and Mastercard Developer APIs to retrieve card-level benefits, merchant offers, time-limited promotions, and loyalty program data. What You Will Build • Visa VDBP (Digital Benefits Platform) integration to retrieve card-tier benefits (lounge access, travel insurance, purchase protection) using BIN-based queries without PAN data • Visa VMORC (Merchant Offers Resource Center) integration for merchant offers filtered by country, with 12-hour refresh compliance • Visa VOP (Offers Platform) integration for card-linked offer activation with webhook callbacks • Visa VCES (Card Eligibility Service) for real-time benefit eligibility verification at redemption points • Mastercard PCLO (Personalized Card-Linked Offers) for personalized, merchant-funded offers based on transaction history • Mastercard Loyalty Airport API for LoungeKey integration • Mastercard Loyalty User Management API for rewards platform enrollment • Multi-source offer aggregation service that deduplicates, normalizes, and categorizes offers from all sources • Redis-based caching layer with differentiated TTLs (24h for permanent benefits, 1h for offers, 15min for time-limited promotions) • Arabic/English bilingual content pipeline since neither Visa nor Mastercard APIs return Arabic content natively • Offer expiration tracking with Redis sorted sets and push notification triggers Tech Stack (Non-Negotiable) • Backend: ASP.NET Core 8.0+ with C# • Architecture: CQRS with MediatR, Clean Architecture • Database: PostgreSQL • Caching: Redis • Messaging: RabbitMQ • Cloud: AWS (EKS, RDS) • Authentication: Mutual TLS (Visa), OAuth 1.0a with PKCS#12 (Mastercard) Required Experience • 3+ years working with payment card network APIs (Visa Developer Platform and/or Mastercard Developers) • Hands-on experience with mutual TLS certificate management and OAuth 1.0a signing • Experience building offer aggregation or card-linked offer platforms • Strong ASP.NET Core / C# skills with Clean Architecture patterns • Experience with Redis caching strategies for financial data • Understanding of BIN-based card identification (first 6–8 digits) and PCI DSS compliance boundaries • Experience with webhook/callback implementations for real-time event processing Strongly Preferred • Previous work in GCC, or MENA fintech • Experience with open banking aggregators • Arabic language skills or experience building bilingual Arabic/English applications Engagement Details • Duration: 3–6 months (contract, potential extension) • Hours: 30–40 hours/week • Communication: Daily standups, JIRA for sprint planning, English (Arabic a plus) • Deliverables: Working integration layer with full documentation, unit tests, and knowledge transfer to backend team To Apply, Please Include 1. A brief description of your most relevant Visa or Mastercard API integration project 2. Which specific Visa/Mastercard APIs you have used (VDBP, VOP, VMORC, VCES, PCLO, Loyalty Airport, etc.) 3. How you handled mutual TLS or OAuth 1.0a certificate management in production 4. Your experience with caching strategies for card benefits/offers data 5. Your availability, hourly rate, and time zone

HeimTech Scientific LLC is seeking an experienced C# WPF developer to build GoTagBase Studio, a Windows desktop application for instrumentation and controls engineers working in oil and gas, petrochemical, and industrial process facilities. The product is fully specified. A complete Product Requirements Document (PRD), UI mockups for all nine screens, and a data model are ready for handoff. You will not be figuring out what to build — you will be executing against a detailed spec. What you will build: SQLite-backed project file (.gtb format) Instrument Index with grid view and form view Document Register, Cable Schedule, Junction Box Schedule, and Cause & Effect Matrix modules Excel and PDF export for all modules Stripe-based license activation system Tech stack: C# / WPF / .NET Framework SQLite Stripe API integration What we are looking for: Demonstrated experience shipping a commercial Windows desktop application using C# and WPF Clean, maintainable code — this product will be sold commercially Strong communication and ability to work from a written spec Screening question: Have you built and shipped a commercial Windows desktop application using C# and WPF? Please describe it.

This is a remote position. We are seeking a skilled Full Stack .NET Developer to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will have experience working with both .NET Framework and .NET Core, proficient in developing and maintaining complex web applications, APIs, and client interfaces. You will be responsible for the full software development lifecycle, including design, development, testing, deployment, and maintenance. Job Description: - Develop and maintain EPM Client applications using .NET 4.8, Visual Studio 2022, and MS SQL Database. - Design and implement EPM Web Page and API using .NET Core 7.0 and Blazor Server Pages. - Ensure the web applications and APIs are hosted and managed effectively using Rancher Kubernetes and Docker Clusters. - Perform database access and management for web pages via API clients and Entity Framework. - Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new features. - Maintain code repository using Azure DevOps and adhere to best practices for version control and continuous integration. - Troubleshoot, debug, and upgrade existing software. - Write clear, scalable, and optimized code. - Provide technical support and training to end-users. - Stay up-to-date with emerging technologies and apply them into operations and activities. Requirements Required Technical Skills: Proficiency in .NET Framework 4.8 and .NET Core 7.0. Experience with Visual Studio 2022. Strong knowledge of MS SQL Database. Expertise in Blazor Server Pages for developing interactive web UIs. Experience with Docker and Kubernetes, specifically managing Docker clusters with Rancher. Proficient in Entity Framework for database access. Familiarity with API development and integration. Experience with Azure DevOps for code repository and CI/CD pipelines. Preferred Technical Skills: Experience with other JavaScript frameworks/libraries (e.g., React, Angular). Knowledge of cloud platforms and services (e.g., Azure, AWS). Experience with Git for version control. Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies. Soft Skills: Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills. Strong communication and collaboration skills. Ability to work independently and as part of a team. Attention to detail and a commitment to quality.

  • Rating is 5.0 out of 5.
    5.0
    4.99 Stars, based on 235 feedbacks

  • Location Bermuda
  • Hourly: $10.00 - $25.00
  • Expert
  • Est. time: More than 6 months, 30+ hrs/week

== About the Role: == We're expanding a custom-built MGA (Managing General Agent) platform-as-a-service — a modern, microservices-based insurance technology product. We have a strong lead developer in place and are looking for a capable second developer to work under his technical direction. You'll be contributing across the full stack: backend services, frontend UI, infrastructure, and integrations. This is a hands-on building role, not an advisory one. == Communication & Language: == Fluent or native-level English is required. You must have excellent written and verbal communication skills — this is non-negotiable. You'll be working closely with a small team and need to articulate technical decisions, ask good questions, and communicate progress clearly. == Working Hours & Availability: == You should be active during CET business hours as your primary working window. Occasional evening calls (CET) may be required from time to time for coordination with stakeholders in other time zones. == Core Backend (Required): == Strong .NET Core experience, ideally within a microservices architecture. Solid RESTful API design and development skills. Working knowledge of authentication and authorization patterns (JWT, OIDC, OAuth 2.0). == Database (Required): == Proficiency in PostgreSQL — schema design, migrations, indexing, and query optimization. == Frontend (Required): == Practical React experience using modern patterns (hooks, context/state management, API integration). Comfortable building functional, clean UI — not just wiring up templates. == Architecture & System Design (Required): == Experience working within microservices-based systems. Understanding of scalable, maintainable system design — separation of concerns, service boundaries, data contracts. == DevOps & Infrastructure (Important): == Hands-on Docker experience. Familiarity with AWS services (deployment, environment configuration, monitoring/logging). Understanding of CI/CD pipelines and release workflows. == Messaging & Async Processing (Important): == Experience with message brokers (RabbitMQ or similar). Understanding of event-driven architecture, background job processing, and asynchronous workflows. == Code Quality & Collaboration (Required): == Experience with code reviews and writing clean, well-structured code. Strong debugging and problem-solving instincts. Comfortable working in an agile, iterative environment. Able to take direction from a lead developer and work collaboratively within a small team. == AI-Assisted Development (Nice to Have): == Exposure to AI-assisted development tools such as Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Claude, or ChatGPT. Ability to use AI productively for code generation, debugging, documentation, and workflow acceleration — while maintaining code quality, security awareness, and proper validation of generated output. == Conversational AI & NLP (Nice to Have): == Familiarity with Rasa (or Rasa X) for building task-oriented chatbots and dialogue management. Exposure to natural language processing concepts — intent classification, entity extraction, dialogue flows. Experience integrating conversational AI or NLP-powered features into web applications. == Domain & Bonus (Nice to Have): == Experience in insurance, fintech, or regulated financial services. Familiarity with insurance-specific concepts (policy lifecycle, endorsements, claims/FNOL) is a plus but not required. Exposure to chatbot or conversational AI integrations in a customer-facing context. == Payment & Financial Integrations (Nice to Have): == Experience integrating with payment gateways such as Authorize.Net (Auth.net) or similar processors. Familiarity with bank site integrations, ACH/EFT processing, or payment reconciliation workflows. Understanding of PCI compliance considerations in web applications. == Screening & Hiring Process: == We're moving quickly on this hire. Here's what to expect: 1. Application Review — We'll review all proposals and shortlist candidates based on qualifications and fit. Please confirm in your proposal which of the skills and qualifications listed above you posess. 2. Video Submission — Shortlisted candidates will be asked to submit a short video (3–5 minutes) of themselves walking through a piece of code or a project they're particularly proud of. The video should include a headshot (face visible on camera) and clearly explain how the code works, the decisions you made, and why. Not all applicants will be asked for this step. 3. Initial Interview — The strongest video submissions will be invited to a brief interview to discuss experience, working style, and fit. 4. Technical Interview — Top candidates from the initial interview will complete a technical interview. ==Timeline: == We aim to complete all interview stages this week or early next, with a hire decision by mid-to-late next week. If you're not available to move through the process on that timeline, please let us know in your proposal. == Important — Contact Policy: == Please apply and communicate exclusively through Upwork. Any attempts to contact us outside the platform will be ignored.
